nasb.text: “I overthrew you, as God overthrew Sodom and Gomorrah, And you were like a firebrand snatched from a blaze; Yet you have not returned to Me,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: “I overthrew some of you, as when God overthrew Sodom and Gomorrah, and you were as a brand plucked out of the burning; yet you did not return to me,” declares the Lord.

cnv.text: “我傾覆你們， 就像傾覆所多瑪和蛾摩拉一樣； 你們像一根木柴， 從火裡抽出來； 但你們仍不歸向我。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: “我在你们中间施行毁灭， 如从前毁灭所多玛和蛾摩拉一样， 使你们像从火里抽出的一根柴。 尽管如此，你们仍不归向我。 这是耶和华说的。
